'''Caarimon''' was a [[Temperature/Legends|warm]] and [[Water/Legends|steamy]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Caarite]] race, and one of the head offices of the [[Metatheran Cartel]], which was a Caarite-dominated trade organization.<ref name="LFCG" />

Many millennia before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the axis of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] shifted dramatically after a tremendous [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] strike. The seasons drastically shortened, and a new tropical environment changed the world and how the Caarites could live. Their cities now seemed to produce toxins into the land that was slowly killing the planet. They therefore moved their homes to the clouds, building massive floating cites that aided in preserving the strange new plant life on the ground.

{{Planet-stub}}
